questions.original_question: Please confirm unlimited AI token usage is included in the standard annual subscription.
questions.generated_answer: No — unlimited AI token usage is not included in the standard annual subscription. The standard commercial position explicitly excludes unlimited AI usage, and AI consumption is handled through agreed volume bands alongside the annual subscription (implementation is scoped separately).
